ProtiBite™

Smart Nutrition. Premium Taste. Modern Lifestyle.
⚡ High Protein 🌿 No Maida 🚫 No Refined Sugar 🍃 100% Vegetarian

"Reimagining the Future of Biscuits."

01 / 15
The Challenge

India's Breakfast Crisis

⏰

Skipping Breakfast

Millions of students, professionals and parents skip breakfast daily due to busy modern schedules — trading nutrition for time.

🍬

Hidden Sugar Overload

Traditional cream biscuits are loaded with refined sugar, maida and artificial flavours — marketed as snacks but functioning as junk.

🥗

Taste vs. Nutrition Trade-off

Healthy biscuits taste dry and boring. Tasty biscuits have zero nutrition. Consumers are forced to choose — and usually choose taste.

📦

No Premium Positioning

The Indian biscuit market is flooded with commodity products. There is no aspirational, premium, nutrition-first biscuit brand for modern India.

Skip breakfast daily67%
Consume excess sugar from biscuits81%
Want healthier snack options74%
Willing to pay premium for nutrition58%

Source: FMCG India Consumer Report 2024

02 / 15
Our Answer

One Brand. Three Innovations.

01
☕

Chai Harmony Wheel

A premium tea-time biscuit built around India's most beloved ritual. Cardamom, fennel & warm spices baked into a beautiful wheel shape.

  • Premium chai-inspired flavour profile
  • Iconic wheel / tyre structure
  • No artificial flavours or colours
  • Perfect with every cup of chai
02
🍓

FruitBurst Wheel

Real fruit pieces — mango, strawberry, orange peel — baked inside the dough. No cream. No filling. Pure, real fruit experience in every bite.

  • Actual dried fruit pieces inside dough
  • No artificial fruit flavouring
  • High in fiber & plant protein
  • Kids & adults will love it
03
🍫

Salt & Cocoa Bite

A savory outer shell with a rich dark chocolate center. Premium contrast. Sophisticated taste. A biscuit unlike anything in India's market today.

  • Savoury crunch → dark chocolate melt
  • Premium wafer-style construction
  • No added refined sugar
  • High protein · antioxidant-rich

Biscuit 01

Chai Harmony Wheel

"A premium tea companion biscuit infused with cardamom, fennel & warm chai spices. Designed to enhance every tea-time moment."

Taste Journey

First bite → Cardamom burst
Unfolds → Milky, warm notes
Deepens → Fennel & cinnamon warmth
Finish → Light sweet, lingering spice

Key Ingredients

🌾 Whole Wheat Flour45%
🥛 Milk Powder15%
🧈 Bakery Fat14%
📅 Date Powder10%
🥜 Almond Powder5%
🫚 Cardamom2%
🌿 Fennel2%
🍂 Cinnamon1%

Biscuit 02

FruitBurst Wheel

"No cream. No artificial filling. Just real strawberry, mango and orange peel baked right into the dough — a fruit experience unlike any biscuit before it."

Taste Journey

First bite → Satisfying crunch
Unfolds → Real fruit burst
Deepens → Natural sweetness
Finish → Fresh, citrus aftertaste

Key Ingredients

🌾 Whole Wheat Flour48%
🧈 Bakery Fat15%
🥛 Milk Powder10%
📅 Date Powder10%
🍓 Dried Fruit Pieces8%
🥜 Almond Powder3%
🍊 Orange Peel2%
🌿 Natural Fruit Powder2%

Biscuit 03

Salt & Cocoa Bite

"A bold combination of savory spices and premium dark chocolate. Namkeen outside. Chocolate inside. A smarter indulgence."

Taste Journey

First bite → Crispy savory crunch
Centre breaks → Rich dark chocolate core
Melts → Smooth 60–70% cocoa
Finish → Slight sweet · Satisfying close

Outer Shell

🌾 Chickpea Flour
🌾 Oats Flour
🫧 Quinoa Puffs
🌱 Flax Seeds
🧂 Rock Salt
⚫ Black Pepper

Chocolate Core

🍫 Dark Choc 60–70%
🟤 Cocoa Powder
📅 Dates Paste
🥥 Coconut Oil
🥜 Almond Butter
09 / 15
Product Architecture

Salt & Cocoa — Layer by Layer

4.6g

Protein

2.8g

Fiber

3.5g

Good Fats

0g

Added Sugar

Outer Shell — Savory & Wholesome

Crispy, lightly spiced outer layer packed with protein & fiber. Uses chickpea, oats, quinoa — no maida.

Chickpea Flour 40% Oats Flour Quinoa Puffs Flax Seeds Black Pepper 1% Rock Salt 2% Ajwain Pumpkin Seeds
Inner Core — Rich & Smooth Chocolate

Premium 60–70% dark chocolate core made with natural sweeteners — dates paste & coconut oil. Antioxidant-rich indulgence.

Dark Chocolate 18% Dates Paste 5% Cocoa Powder 3% Almond Butter 3% Coconut Oil

✦ First Bite: Savory Crunch → Melts into Dark Chocolate → Slight Sweet, Satisfying Finish ✦

12 / 15
Brand Identity

What Makes Us Different

⭕

Iconic Wheel Structure

Distinctive tyre-inspired wheel shape for Chai and FruitBurst — stands out on every shelf and in every photograph.

🍓

Real Fruit Inside Dough

Not flavouring. Not extract. Real dried strawberry, mango and orange peel pieces baked right into the FruitBurst dough.

☕

Chai-Inspired Innovation

First biscuit built specifically around India's tea ritual — cardamom, fennel and warm spices that pair perfectly with chai.

🍫

Savoury × Chocolate

Salt & Cocoa Bite introduces a premium flavour tension — namkeen outside, dark chocolate inside — unprecedented in Indian biscuits.

🇮🇳

Premium Indian Identity

Built for modern India — flavours rooted in Indian tradition, presented with the quality of a global premium FMCG brand.

📖

Storytelling-First Brand

Every product has a concept, a purpose and a taste journey. ProtiBite doesn't sell biscuits — it sells experiences and rituals.
